_publications._publicationTitle: Spatial Gene-Expression Profiling Unveils Immuno-oncogenic Programs of NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Progression.

_contextSnippet: Similar results were observed in mice with conditional biallelic inactivation of Nf1 driven by Desert hedgehog Cre (DhhCre) and germline loss of Cdkn2a (Ink4a/Arf)
details: Conditional biallelic inactivation of Nf1 driven by DhhCre and germline loss of Cdkn2a (Ink4a/Arf) gives rise to tumors that recapitulate human ANNUBP and progress to MPNST with high penetrance, dependent on gene dosage
